item.title: Implementing midi2wave - Part 1: PixelCNN
item.description: This is an attempt to implement the wave2midi2wave model. Specifically, I’m only interested in the midi2wave part. The only reason behind is to train my PyTorch skills, and attempt to create an AI harmonizer. The model depends on a number of previous architectures, including WaveNet and PixelCNN. Therefore, the best way is probably to implement these models before integrating them into a final midi2wave model. This blog post documents what my steps to implement the first model - PixelCNN [1].

About me Hong Kong based Data Scientist. My work is mainly on prediction and analytics in construction and IoT. Besides, I’m most interested in product analytics and programmatic music generation. Check out my résumé and projects. Feel free to contact me if there are available opportunities.

Projects My side projects. Axomark Anonymous bookmarks with password protection. Link SiteWision Construction site monitoring with deep learning. Link C# MSSQL Wrapper SQL Server Query builder for C#. GitHub | NuGet Distributed estimation via paid crowd work Accepted ICASSP 2016 research paper on collective intelligence. IEEE Link PTAM on Android Porting the PTAM Augmented Reality algorithm to Android 4.x as my final year project in university. Demo Video 1 | Demo Video 2
